3177940.name: Cherry Blossom Set - WorldNeverland - Daily Life in the Elnea Kingdom - Another Life Adventure
3177940.description:
A seasonal collection of outfits and items inspired by the beauty of sakura.

New content will be available for purchase at shops in Yano Market and Castle St.

This DLC includes the following items:

  • Outfits

Available at Matsuri Apparel on Castle St.

Sakura Formal Kimono, Sakura Kid's Formal Kimono, Sakura Wedding Attire, Comfy Sakura Knight Clothes

  • Dyes

Available at Kagari Accouterments on Castle St.

Cherry Blossom Hair Dye, Pink Hair Dye, Ihm Color: Pink

  • Japanese Sweets

Available at Wiala’s Tavern and Warm 'n' Toasty Grill in Yano Market.

Classic Wa Sakura Rice Cake, Original Wa Sakura Rice Cake

※ This content can only be purchased once per account.

※ If you uninstall the DLC after saving, that save data will no longer be loadable.

※ The base game (sold separately) is required to use this content.

Please ensure your game is updated to the latest version if necessary.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
